device.title: Device
device.description: Configure the lawn mower and basic settings.

data_description.name: Name of this Smart Mow instance (used as prefix for all entities).
data_description.min_battery_pct: Mowing is only allowed when battery is at least this level.

dwd_weather.title: DWD Weather Data
dwd_weather.description: Configure DWD weather sensors for forecasts.

data_description.dwd_weather_entity_id: Used as fallback for temperature and humidity attributes.
data_description.dwd_radiation_entity_id: W/m² sensor with hourly forecast in 'data' attribute.
data_description.dwd_precip_entity_id: mm/h sensor with hourly forecast in 'data' attribute.
data_description.dwd_wind_entity_id: km/h sensor for drying factor calculation.

rain_sensors.title: Rain Sensors
rain_sensors.description: Configure your local rain gauge sensors (e.g. Netatmo).

data_description.rain_1h_sensor_entity_id: Native 1-hour rain sum from the gauge (no buffer needed).
data_description.rain_today_sensor_entity_id: Cumulative rain since midnight — used for night rain detection.

data_description.outdoor_temp_entity_id: °C. Fallback: temperature attribute from DWD weather entity.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_entity_id: % relative humidity. Fallback: humidity attribute from DWD weather entity.
data_description.brightness_entity_id: Lux. If below min_brightness, mowing is blocked (hedgehog protection).
data_description.min_brightness_lux: Mowing requires at least this brightness.

radiation_fallback.title: Radiation Source Fallback
radiation_fallback.description: No DWD radiation sensor configured. Choose a radiation fallback source.

data_description.radiation_source: 'pv' = use PV output as proxy, 'sun' = use sun elevation angle.
data_description.pv_peak_kw: Installed peak power in kW for normalization.

mow_times.title: Mow Window & Thresholds
mow_times.description: All values can be changed later in the options flow.

data_description.full_cycle_duration_h: Duration of one full mowing cycle.
data_description.threshold_wetness_score: Mowing blocked if wetness score >= this value.
data_description.threshold_rain_today_remaining_mm: Mowing blocked if forecast rain today >= this value.
data_description.threshold_rain_tomorrow_mm: Emergency mow triggered if forecast rain tomorrow >= this value.
data_description.threshold_min_time_for_emergency_h: Emergency mow only if this many hours remain in mow window.
data_description.threshold_dew_temp_offset: Dew considered evaporated if temp > dew_point + this offset.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant.
error.already_configured: An instance with this name is already configured.

init.title: Mow Window & Thresholds
init.description: Adjust mowing times and decision thresholds.
